name: Payroll Diversion / Invoice Fraud Actors
investigation_questions: Did the fraud begin with payroll administrator mailbox
Were malicious OAuth grants or delegated permissions cr
Which payroll, HR, or accounts payable systems were acc
Did help desk staff approve suspicious payroll reset re
containment: Immediately stop and verify pending payroll and invoice
Invalidate affected HR, payroll, and finance sessions
Review mailbox forwarding rules and suspicious delegate
Audit recent payroll deposit changes and vendor account
